title: althenia filiformis
intro: Althenia filiformis, also known as the thread-leaved althenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Althenia filiformis is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and promoting digestion. Althenia filiformis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
